series_metadata.series_description: These files include Self-insured employers appeals to the Self-Insured Review Panel (SIRP). The files also include the SIRP Order with the decision regarding the appeal, the conference packet prepared by the Self-Insured department, documents submitted by the employer, and BWC attorney handwritten notes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper files 30 days scanning ; Electronic: five (5) years in Legal UDS and SIRP SharePoint
